race.comment: Looks a good race for HOUDINI (7) to return to winning ways. He was too strong three back as favourite and has just found one better at his past couple, only beaten a long neck last start at Geelong. He drops 2kg into this and will take holding out in a winnable race. SO SUAVE (13) broke through for a smart win at Cranbourne last time when coming away late. He draws soft and can go on with it. ALL SO CLEAR (3) is struggling to break through but hasn't been far away of late and certainly has the peaks to win. EN FLIQUE (11) is going well, close up in two runs since a Caulfield Heath victory. She only needs to hold that form to be right there again.
